sentences.arabic: زَارَ رَئِيسُ الْوُزَرَاءِ دَوْلَةً مُجَاوِرَةً لِتَعْزِيزِ التَّعَاوُنِ.
sentences.translation: Premijer je posjetio susjednu zemlju kako bi ojačao saradnju.
sentences.translationEn: The Prime Minister visited a neighboring country to strengthen cooperation.

sentences.arabic: نَاقَشَ الطَّرَفَانِ اتِّفَاقِيَّاتٍ تِجَارِيَّةً جَدِيدَةً بَيْنَ الْبَلَدَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Obje strane su razgovarale o novim trgovinskim sporazumima između dvije zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: Both sides discussed new trade agreements between the two countries.

sentences.arabic: تَمَّ التَّوْقِيعُ عَلَى مُذَكَّرَةِ تَفَاهُمٍ فِي مَجَالِ التَّعْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Potpisan je memorandum o razumijevanju u oblasti obrazovanja.
sentences.translationEn: A memorandum of understanding was signed in the field of education.

sentences.arabic: أَعْرَبَ الرَّئِيسُ عَنْ سَعَادَتِهِ بِهَذِهِ الزِّيَارَةِ النَّاجِحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednik je izrazio zadovoljstvo ovom uspješnom posjetom.
sentences.translationEn: The President expressed his happiness with this successful visit.

sentences.arabic: سَتَبْدَأُ الرِّحْلَاتُ الْجَوِيَّةُ الْمُبَاشِرَةُ فِي الشَّهْرِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Direktni letovi će početi sljedećeg mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Direct flights will start next month.
